data.title: STOCKS | U.S. Stocks Open Higher Amid Aluminum Industry Tensions
data.description: U.S. stocks opened higher on March 30, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average rising by 0.78%, the S&P 500 index increasing by 0.77%, and the Nasdaq Composite climbing by 0.7%. According to Jin10, shares of Alcoa Corporation surged by 7.9% following reports of Iranian attacks on major aluminum plants in Bahrain and the UAE. The geopolitical tensions have raised concerns about the stability of aluminum supply chains, impacting market sentiment.

data.title: Alphabet Shares Expected to Rebound Above $310 by April 2026
data.description: Alphabet shares are projected to close above $310 by April 2026, despite a nearly 14% decline year to date. According to NS3.AI, the forecast is supported by a 14-day Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 18.2 and the upcoming Q1 2026 earnings release on April 23, which could drive a recovery towards the $315 resistance level.

data.title: European stock indices and precious metals rose across the board, while the US dollar came under pressure and fell.
data.description: According to the latest data from Gate, gold prices rose to $4,569.26 per ounce, a daily increase of 1.70%. Silver prices rose to $71.271 per ounce, a daily increase of 2.30%. The BVIX (BTC Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 54.06, a daily increase of 0.26%. The EVIX (ETH Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 73.61, a daily decrease of 1.06%. In the foreign exchange market, the USD/CNH exchange rate fell 0.04% to 6.91630. The USD/JPY exchange rate fell 0.55% to 159.366. In global stock indices, the Euro Stoxx 50 rose 1.56% to 5,539.15 points; the UK FTSE 100 rose 1.95% to 10,084.99 points; and the German DAX 40 rose 1.50% to 22,434.31 points. In commodities, WTI crude oil rose 0.58% to $101.96 per barrel, and Brent crude oil rose 0.83% to $111.63 per barrel. Gate allows users to directly trade traditional financial market products on its platform, providing a one-stop solution for precious metals, forex, global equity CFDs, major indices, and commodities, achieving deep integration of crypto assets and traditional financial assets. Gate TradFi features have been fully integrated into the Gate App and Web platform, allowing users to easily participate in global asset price trading without switching platforms, unlocking more strategies and opportunities outside the crypto market, and continuously enhancing their diversified asset allocation experience.

data.title: Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac Stocks Surge at Market Open
data.description: Fannie Mae's stock price surged by 14% at the market open, while Freddie Mac saw an 11% increase. According to Jin10, this significant rise in stock prices reflects investor optimism and market confidence in these government-sponsored enterprises. The increase comes amid broader market movements and economic indicators that are influencing investor behavior. Analysts are closely monitoring these developments to assess their potential impact on the housing finance sector and the overall economy.

data.title: Philippines Boosts Petroleum Stockpile Amid Global Supply Challenges
data.description: The Philippines has announced an increase in its petroleum product reserves to cover 51 days of consumption. Bloomberg posted on X that this move comes as the nation, heavily reliant on imports, seeks alternative suppliers due to ongoing conflicts in Iran. The decision reflects the country's proactive approach to securing energy resources amidst global uncertainties.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 68,000 USDT with a 2.18% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 30, 2026, 13:22 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 68,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 68,127.976563 USDT, with a narrowed 2.18% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Bill Ackman Highlights Investment Opportunities Amid Global Market Conditions
data.description: On March 30, renowned hedge fund manager Bill Ackman shared his insights on social media regarding current investment opportunities. According to BlockBeats, Ackman emphasized that some of the world's top companies are trading at exceptionally low prices. He advised investors to disregard mainstream media narratives, suggesting that the ongoing global conflict is one of the most lopsided in history, with outcomes likely to benefit both the United States and the world. Ackman expressed optimism about the potential for substantial peace dividends and described the present as one of the best times to invest in high-quality assets, urging investors to ignore bearish sentiments.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Optimistic About Strait of Hormuz Reopening
data.description: U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent expressed optimism regarding the potential reopening of the Strait of Hormuz for cargo ship passage. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Bessent's remarks about the administration's ongoing efforts to tackle the global oil supply shortage. The reopening of this crucial maritime route is seen as a significant step towards stabilizing oil distribution worldwide.

data.title: Aster Updates Token Economics and Restructures Ecosystem Emissions
data.description:
Aster has announced a significant update to its token economics and a restructuring of its ecosystem emissions. According to Foresight News, the previous monthly linear unlocking mechanism has been replaced with a staking-only emission model. Previously, 78.4 million ASTER tokens, representing 1% of the maximum supply, were unlocked monthly on a linear schedule. With the update, ecosystem tokens will now be released solely as staking rewards, currently at a rate of 450,000 ASTER per week, equating to a monthly release of 1.8 million to 2.25 million ASTER.

Aster stated that since the Token Generation Event (TGE) on September 17, 2025, all unlocked ecosystem and community tokens, aside from staking rewards, have remained unused. The holdings of these tokens can be publicly verified through addresses starting with 0x0A55.

data.title: Hyperliquid Platform Whale Holdings Reach $3.489 Billion
data.description:
Hyperliquid platform's whale holdings currently amount to $3.489 billion, according to ChainCatcher. Data from Coinglass reveals that long positions account for $1.765 billion, representing 50.59% of the total, while short positions stand at $1.724 billion, making up 49.41%. The long positions have incurred a loss of $87.9829 million, whereas the short positions have gained $113 million.

Notably, a whale address, 0xa5b0..41, has taken a 15x leveraged long position on ETH at a price of $2,148.7, resulting in an unrealized loss of $5.1804 million.

data.title: Bill Ackman: High-quality companies are trading at extremely low prices; now is the best time to buy quality assets.
data.description: Bill Ackman posted on the X platform that some of the world's best companies are trading at extremely low prices. He advised ignoring mainstream media coverage, arguing that this is one of the most uneven wars in history, ultimately benefiting the US and the world, and potentially yielding huge peace dividends. He believes now is one of the best times in the long term to buy quality assets and that bearish sentiment should be ignored.

data.title: Aave launched its v4 upgrade on Ethereum, aiming to expand DeFi into the real-world lending market.
data.description: Aave has officially launched its v4 upgrade on Ethereum, after approximately two years of development. This upgrade introduces a new architecture that separates lending markets while sharing liquidity, aiming to expand DeFi from crypto-native lending to real-world assets and institutional use cases. Version v4 changes how Aave organizes its markets, allowing different types of lending markets to operate independently while sharing the same liquidity pool, enabling users to lend and borrow on assets beyond crypto tokens in the future. Stani Kulechov, founder of Aave Labs, stated that lending is based on trust and requires lending conditions that reflect market conditions. He also noted that the upgrade facilitates development and expansion on top of the protocol by other teams. In terms of capital efficiency, version v4 also allows for the reinvestment of idle funds within the system. The upgrade launches with a limited set of markets and conservative parameter settings; more features will be added gradually after governance resolutions. This launch comes at a time when governance disputes are raging within the Aave ecosystem regarding decentralization and revenue distribution.

data.title: Binance will launch perpetual contracts for CL, BZ, and NATGAS.
data.description: According to an official announcement, Binance will launch perpetual contracts for CL, BZ, and NATGAS.

data.title: Israel's Central Bank: Inflation Intensifies Due to Rising Global Energy Prices
data.description: Israel's Central Bank has reported an increase in inflation since its last rate decision, primarily driven by a significant rise in global energy prices. According to Jin10, the central bank highlighted the impact of these energy costs on the country's economic environment. The statement underscores the challenges faced by Israel in managing inflationary pressures amid fluctuating global markets. The central bank's observations come as energy prices continue to affect economies worldwide, prompting concerns over potential policy adjustments to address inflation.

data.title: Israel's Central Bank: Geopolitical Uncertainty Intensifies Amid Iran Conflict
data.description: Israel's Central Bank has reported an increase in geopolitical uncertainty both domestically and internationally since the outbreak of the conflict with Iran. According to Jin10, the bank highlighted concerns regarding the duration, intensity, and eventual outcome of the conflict, which have contributed to heightened unpredictability in the region.

data.title: Brazil's Central Bank Governor: Oil Price Supply Shock May Lead to Higher Inflation and Lower Growth
data.description: According to Jin10, Brazil's Central Bank Governor has expressed concerns that the supply shock caused by rising oil prices could result in increased inflation and reduced economic growth. This statement highlights the potential economic challenges that Brazil may face due to fluctuations in the global oil market. The governor's remarks underscore the importance of monitoring commodity prices and their impact on the country's economic stability.

data.title: Morgan Stanley Strategists Predict Bank of England to Hold Rates Steady
data.description: Morgan Stanley strategists Fabio Bassanin and Luca Salford have indicated that members of the Bank of England's Monetary Policy Committee are likely to maintain the interest rate at 3.75% during the policy meeting on April 30. According to Jin10, the strategists noted that most officials at the Bank of England appear inclined to wait for more evidence before addressing the latest inflationary pressures. Data from LSEG shows that the market currently estimates a 62% probability of a 25 basis point rate hike by the Bank of England in April, down from an 87% probability priced in last week.

data.title: Investor Secures 211x Return on ANIME Memecoin Investment
data.description: An investor has achieved a significant return by selling ANIME memecoin for 232.2 SOL, having initially purchased it for 1.1 SOL approximately a year ago. According to NS3.AI, this transaction resulted in a 211x return, with the proceeds valued at around $19,500 following a recent price increase.

data.title: Bitmine increased its holdings by 71,100 ETH last week, and now holds 3.92% of the total ETH supply.
data.description: Last week, Tom Lee and Bitmine increased their holdings by 71,100 ETH. Bitmine stated that it now holds 3.92% of the total ETH token supply.

data.title: U.S. to Resume Processing Some Asylum Claims After Halt
data.description: The Trump administration has announced plans to resume processing certain asylum claims, following a significant pause in immigration paperwork that affected hundreds of thousands of individuals seeking refuge in the United States. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the administration's decision to address the backlog of asylum applications that had been largely halted. This move comes as part of broader efforts to manage immigration processes and address the needs of those seeking asylum in the country. The resumption of processing is expected to impact many individuals who have been waiting for their claims to be reviewed.
